name_en: 💋💋💋 [Original Leather with 🌈(Cdfmall Sanya Duty Free Store Shopping Bag] 🔥🔥 Padlock✨ Black and Monogram mix, retro and classic! This is also the bag king in my heart. Even with so many new arrivals, it stands firm at the counter and is often out of stock! It looks ordinary at first glance, but the more you look, the better it gets. It is definitely a classic and versatile style. Don't worry about capacity; it can hold everything you need for daily use~ Model 432182 Dimensions 20*12.5*8cm
